varieties.name: Alano
varieties.origin: Thailand, introduced to Florida and Australia
varieties.traits: Oval-shaped fruit, medium-sized (4-9 oz / 115-255g), brown skin when ripe
varieties.flesh_fruit: Ultra-fine pear-like texture, exceptionally sweet with brown-sugar flavor, smooth (not gritty), light to medium brown flesh
varieties.yield_notes: Heavy regular producer, reliable cropper, season November-June

varieties.name: Makok (Krasuey)
varieties.origin: Thailand, introduced to Australia
varieties.traits: Long, pointed fruit, conical shape, light brown skin, compact tree growth (true dwarf)
varieties.flesh_fruit: Smooth brown pulp with sweet aroma, excellent taste, typically single small seed
varieties.yield_notes: Superior producer, one of the best yielding varieties, season May-November

varieties.name: Tropical
varieties.origin: Selection developed for Australian tropical/subtropical conditions
varieties.traits: Small to medium fruit, brown skin, adapted to Australian growing conditions
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet, slightly gritty texture, brown sugar flavor
varieties.yield_notes: Very prolific fruiter, heavy cropping, produces well in Queensland climate

varieties.name: Sawo Manila
varieties.origin: Philippines, introduced to Australia, traditional variety 100+ years
varieties.traits: Round to oblong fruit, brown skin with slight russeting
varieties.flesh_fruit: Light to medium brown flesh, sweet with traditional sapodilla flavor, slightly gritty texture
varieties.yield_notes: Good yielder, produces over extended period

varieties.name: Singapore
varieties.origin: Singapore selection
varieties.traits: Medium-sized oval fruit, 50-100g, attractive red-brown flesh when ripe
varieties.flesh_fruit: Red-brown flesh with mild sweet flavor, slightly gritty pear-like texture

varieties.name: Tikal
varieties.origin: Mexico via Florida, USA selection from 1970s
varieties.traits: Ovoid fruit, fat at one end like a top, variable size up to 11 oz (310g)
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pinkish-tan flesh, sweet flavor with granular texture

varieties.name: Ponderosa
varieties.origin: Philippines, popular variety
varieties.traits: Very large fruit, averaging 300g, round to slightly oblong
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet, substantial flesh, good eating quality
varieties.yield_notes: Benefits from cross-pollination for increased fruit set, hand pollination helpful

varieties.name: C55 (Malaysian Clone)
varieties.origin: Malaysia, registered clone from Department of Agriculture Malaysia
varieties.traits: Medium-sized fruit, 60-70g average, light brown skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Delicious sweet flavor, slightly gritty pear-like texture

varieties.name: Brown Sugar
varieties.origin: USA (Florida), introduced 1948, heritage variety
varieties.traits: Medium-small fruit, 5-6.25 cm long, brown skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Intense brown sugar sweetness, smooth texture, soft and juicy

varieties.name: Hasya
varieties.origin: Mexico, #1 commercial cultivar in Mexico
varieties.traits: Extra large football-shaped fruit, typically 13 oz (370g), light brown skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Excellent eating quality, reddish hue throughout pulp, fine pear texture
varieties.yield_notes: Prolific producer, heavy yields, season November-June

varieties.name: Molix
varieties.origin: Mexico
varieties.traits: Football-shaped fruit, 13 oz (370g), darker brown exterior, tree has distinctive curly leaves
varieties.flesh_fruit: Less red inside than Hasya, exceptionally sweet, fine pear texture with pleasant aroma
varieties.yield_notes: Large fruit, heavy cropper, season February-May

varieties.name: Oxkutzcab (Ox)
varieties.origin: Oxkutzcab, Yucatan, Mexico - traditional variety from Mayan region
varieties.traits: Gigantic fruit - extremely large roundish fruit with speckled light-colored skin, up to 28 oz (794g)
varieties.flesh_fruit: Brown flesh with excellent taste, very sweet
varieties.yield_notes: Heavily productive, high yields, season May-September

varieties.name: Morena
varieties.origin: Mexico
varieties.traits: Large oval fruit, brownish exterior
varieties.flesh_fruit: Brownish-red flesh, smooth texture, rich sweet pulp with pleasant aroma

varieties.name: Silas Woods
varieties.origin: Central American rainforests (Mexico/Belize region), selected variety
varieties.traits: Dwarf growth habit (under 20 ft), compact tree
varieties.flesh_fruit: Exceptionally sweet, caramel-like flavor, excellent quality
varieties.yield_notes: Highly productive, branches often require support from heavy fruit load, year-round fruiting

varieties.name: Butterscotch
varieties.origin: Florida selection
varieties.traits: Small to medium fruit size
varieties.flesh_fruit: Unique caramel-butter flavor, dessert-like taste, melt-in-your-mouth texture

varieties.name: Seedling Trees (Various)
varieties.origin: Seed-grown from various parent trees
varieties.traits: Variable fruit size, shape, and quality depending on genetics
varieties.flesh_fruit: Variable sweetness and texture, some may be excellent, others mediocre
varieties.yield_notes: Unpredictable - some trees may never fruit due to pollen sterility, others produce well after 5-8 years

varieties.name: Kalipatti (Kali Patti) 🏆
varieties.origin: India - Maharashtra, Gujarat, North Karnataka. Traditional variety, 50+ years cultivation
varieties.traits: Dark green broad thick leaves, oval-shaped fruits, 144.5g average weight, spreading branch habit
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet pulpy flesh, mellow texture, excellent quality, TSS 23.1°Brix, very low acidity (0.16%), 1-4 seeds per fruit
varieties.yield_notes: 156-166 kg per mature tree, 350-400 fruits per tree, excellent productivity

varieties.name: Cricket Ball (Calcutta Large) 🏆
varieties.origin: India - Calcutta/Kolkata region, traditional variety 50+ years
varieties.traits: Large round fruits like a cricket ball (hence name), light green leaves, 157g average weight
varieties.flesh_fruit: Gritty and granular texture, sweet flavor, TSS 22.6°Brix, light brown flesh
varieties.yield_notes: 157 kg per mature tree, good productivity

varieties.name: CO-1 🧬
varieties.origin: India - Tamil Nadu Agricultural University (TNAU), 1954 hybrid: Cricket Ball × Oval
varieties.traits: Long oval shape, medium-sized, 125g average weight
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet, reddish-brown flesh, bigger than Oval parent, sweeter than Cricket Ball, TSS 18°Brix
varieties.yield_notes: 175-200 kg per tree per year, superior yield over parents, bearing starts 4th year
varieties.growing_notes: First successful sapota hybrid in India. Developed specifically for Indian tropical monsoon conditions including Kerala. Superior performance over both parents. Resistant to leaf spot disease. Excellent for commercial cultivation in Kerala. Grafted/budded plants recommended. Well-adapted to monsoon rainfall patterns.
varieties.availability: Tamil Nadu and Kerala agricultural nurseries, commercial availability

varieties.name: CO-2 🧬
varieties.origin: India - TNAU, clonal selection from Baramasi
varieties.traits: Medium tree height, oblong-round fruit, medium-sized, 125-150g
varieties.flesh_fruit: Soft juicy flesh, sweet, gritty, light brown color with pleasant aroma, TSS 23°Brix

varieties.name: CO-3 🧬
varieties.origin: India - TNAU, hybrid: Cricket Ball × Vavivalasa
varieties.traits: Oblong shape, light brown fruit, suitable for high-density planting
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet taste
varieties.yield_notes: 157 kg per tree annually, bearing from 4th year onwards
varieties.growing_notes: Specifically bred for high-density commercial orchards in Kerala/Tamil Nadu. Intermediate tree stature suitable for intensive planting systems. Well-adapted to tropical monsoon climate. Good for commercial Kerala cultivation where land is premium.
varieties.availability: Tamil Nadu and Kerala agricultural nurseries, commercial growers

varieties.name: PKM-1 🌱
varieties.origin: India - Periyakulam Horticultural Research Station, Tamil Nadu, clonal selection from Guthi
varieties.traits: Dwarf variety, thin skin, 80g average weight
varieties.flesh_fruit: Buttery and very sweet pulp, rich in sugars, TSS 23°Brix

varieties.name: PKM-2 (Hybrid 2/4) 🧬
varieties.origin: India - Periyakulam, Tamil Nadu, hybrid: Guthi × Kirti Bharti
varieties.traits: Variable size
varieties.flesh_fruit: Good quality
varieties.growing_notes: Developed specifically for South Indian tropical conditions. Well-adapted to Kerala's monsoon climate. Hybrid vigor provides good disease resistance and yield. Suitable for commercial cultivation in Kerala.
varieties.availability: Tamil Nadu and Kerala agricultural nurseries

varieties.name: PKM-3 🧬
varieties.origin: India - Periyakulam, 1994 release, hybrid: Guthi × Cricket Ball
varieties.traits: Vertical growth habit, big-sized oval fruits, cluster-bearing habit, suitable for high-density planting
varieties.flesh_fruit: Good quality
varieties.yield_notes: 14 tonnes per hectare, excellent for intensive cultivation

varieties.name: PKM-4 🌱
varieties.origin: India - Periyakulam, clonal selection from open-pollinated PKM-1
varieties.traits: Spindle-shaped fruits, suitable for dry flakes production
varieties.flesh_fruit: Attractive light pinkish honey-brown color, crisp and sweet, TSS 24°Brix
varieties.growing_notes: Developed for processing industry in tropical India. High TSS ideal for dried flakes. Well-adapted to Kerala's tropical monsoon climate. Unique spindle shape. Good for both fresh market and processing in Kerala.
varieties.availability: Tamil Nadu and Kerala agricultural institutions

varieties.name: PKM-5 🌱
varieties.origin: India - Periyakulam, recent selection
varieties.traits: Improved variety
varieties.flesh_fruit: Good quality

varieties.name: DHS-1 🧬
varieties.origin: India - University of Agricultural Sciences Dharwad, Karnataka, hybrid: Kalipatti × Cricket Ball
varieties.traits: Vigorous tree, round to slightly oblong fruits, 150g average weight
varieties.flesh_fruit: Very sweet, soft granular mellowing flesh, light orange color, TSS 26°Brix, excellent quality

varieties.name: DHS-2 🧬
varieties.origin: India - UAS Dharwad, Karnataka, hybrid: Kalipatti × Cricket Ball
varieties.traits: Similar to DHS-1
varieties.flesh_fruit: Good quality, sweet
varieties.growing_notes: Sister selection to DHS-1 from same cross. Well-adapted to Kerala's tropical monsoon climate. Comparable quality to DHS-1. Good for commercial cultivation in Kerala/Karnataka region.

varieties.name: Pala 🏆
varieties.origin: India - Andhra Pradesh and Tamil Nadu, traditional variety
varieties.traits: Very small to medium oval or egg-shaped fruits borne in clusters, thin skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Rich sweet flavor

varieties.name: Kirti Bharti (Kirthibarti) 🏆
varieties.origin: India - Andhra Pradesh, traditional variety
varieties.traits: Medium-sized oval fruits, rough and thick peel
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet

varieties.name: Baramasi 🏆
varieties.origin: India - Bihar, West Bengal, Uttar Pradesh, traditional variety (baramasi = 12 months in Hindi)
varieties.traits: Round and medium-shaped fruit
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet
varieties.yield_notes: 12 months yield giving variety - year-round production

varieties.name: Pilipatti (Pilli Patti) 🏆
varieties.origin: India - Maharashtra and Gujarat, traditional variety
varieties.traits: Unique small oblong elongated fruits, suitable for high-density planting, 400-500g fruits
varieties.flesh_fruit: Soft sweet pulp

varieties.name: Chhatri 🌱
varieties.origin: India - traditional variety
varieties.traits: Medium fruit
varieties.flesh_fruit: Lower quality compared to Kalipatti
varieties.yield_notes: High yielding variety despite lower quality

varieties.name: Dhola Diwani 🌱
varieties.origin: India - traditional variety
varieties.traits: Egg-shaped fruits
varieties.flesh_fruit: Good quality

varieties.name: Guthi 🏆
varieties.origin: India - traditional variety, parent of PKM-1 and PKM-3
varieties.traits: Small-sized oval fruits, apex broadly pointed
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet, good quality

varieties.name: Oval 🏆
varieties.origin: India - traditional variety, parent of CO-1 hybrid
varieties.traits: Oval-shaped fruits
varieties.flesh_fruit: Good quality

varieties.name: Calcutta Round 🏆
varieties.origin: India - Calcutta/Kolkata region, traditional variety
varieties.traits: Round fruits
varieties.flesh_fruit: Variable quality

varieties.name: Murabba 🏆
varieties.origin: India - Maharashtra, traditional variety
varieties.traits: Variable size
varieties.flesh_fruit: Good for processing

varieties.name: Baharu 🏆
varieties.origin: India - traditional variety
varieties.traits: Variable
varieties.flesh_fruit: Traditional quality

varieties.name: Gandhevi 🏆
varieties.origin: India - Gujarat, traditional variety
varieties.traits: Variable
varieties.flesh_fruit: Traditional quality

varieties.name: Vavivalsa (Vavi Valsa) 🏆
varieties.origin: India - traditional variety, parent of CO-3
varieties.traits: Variable
varieties.flesh_fruit: Good quality

varieties.name: Banana (Grafted)
varieties.origin: Unknown origin, named for fruit shape
varieties.traits: Elongated banana-like fruit shape
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet

varieties.name: Jambo (Grafted)
varieties.origin: Unknown specific origin
varieties.traits: Variable
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet

varieties.name: Variegated (Graft)
varieties.origin: Ornamental selection, possibly mutation
varieties.traits: Variegated foliage with cream/white markings on leaves - ornamental
varieties.flesh_fruit: Normal sapodilla fruit quality
